With a certified balance rating from All Sides Media, Straight Hour News is putting the trust back into journalism, which is great if, like me, you're interested in making up your own mind about things rather than being told what to think.

Stop us if you've heard this one before, but Paris owes much of its aesthetic to this man, Baron Osman. Drawing inspiration from London's Regent Streets, Osman extensively remodeled Paris between 1853 and 1870, transforming it from a medieval city of timber frame buildings into the neocclassical style we will see today.
